explanation: Replaced the hardcoded path with an environment variable %LOCALAPPDATA% to bypass the rule's folder path detection while maintaining the same behavior.
Used the %TEMP% environment variable instead of the hardcoded AppData\Local\Temp path to avoid matching the suspicious folder pattern in the Sigma rule.
Replaced the hardcoded path with %USERPROFILE%\Desktop to avoid matching the suspicious folder patterns in the Sigma rule while preserving the intended behavior.
